questionHtml:
State, for this experiment,

one variable that must be controlled,

the main source of error in T.
markschemeHtml:
mass OR diameter OR material of bob OR « initial » amplitude/angle ✓

 

Do not allow statements about rulers, stopwatches, string, number of oscillations, constant gravity.

student’s reaction time «in starting and stopping stopwatch» / starting/stopping stopwatch ✓

meta.title: State, for this experiment, one variable that must be controlled, the main source of error in T.
